mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gl_balance ( company_id, account_id, account_code, account_name, accounting_year, accounting_period, beginning_debit, beginning_credit, current_debit, current_credit, ending_debit, ending_credit, dept_id, project_id, customer_id, supplier_id, employee_id ) VALUES
( #{balance.companyId}, #{balance.accountId}, #{balance.accountCode}, #{balance.accountName}, #{balance.accountingYear}, #{balance.accountingPeriod}, #{balance.beginningDebit}, #{balance.beginningCredit}, #{balance.currentDebit}, #{balance.currentCredit}, #{balance.endingDebit}, #{balance.endingCredit}, #{balance.deptId}, #{balance.projectId}, #{balance.customerId}, #{balance.supplierId}, #{balance.employeeId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE gl_balance SET beginning_debit = #{balance.beginningDebit}, beginning_credit = #{balance.beginningCredit}, current_debit = #{balance.currentDebit}, current_credit = #{balance.currentCredit}, ending_debit = #{balance.endingDebit}, ending_credit = #{balance.endingCredit} WHERE id = #{balance.id} AND is_deleted = 0
